# Chapter 7: Prototyping and iteration  (~90 pp)
- 7.1 Why prototype (10) · 7.2 Prototype types: foam, functional, beta, MVP (12) · 7.3 Prototype-driven learning (12) · 7.4 Iteration cadence (10) · 7.5 Knowing when to commit (12) · 7.6 Pilot production and pre-production runs (12) · 7.7 Failure section: prototypes that became products without the work in between (22)

**Archetype**: optimisation, control. **Project**: prototype a small device three times, learning from each iteration. **Exercises**: 20.
